name: Full-screen Vertical with Top Insert + Particle-Burst Captions
description: Single talking-head video filling the entire 1080x1920 vertical frame, with kinetic particle-burst Thai captions. B-roll plays inside a floating 16:9 rounded insert card over the upper third of the frame — the face video stays visible around the card, it does not cover the whole screen.

layout.background: fallback bg.png (rarely visible — the face video covers it)
layout.mainVideo: bottom_visual_master.mp4 full-screen, object-fit cover, gentle inner zoom 1.0 -> 1.05
layout.broll: floating 16:9 insert card, 984x554 px, left 48 / top 24, rounded 30px + gold 4px border, pops in/out near the top of the frame while active

captions.goldTokenRules: numbers, monetary figures, durations, brand/tech names, headline terms

audio.topMuted: n/a — no top video in this template
audio.polishChain: highpass80, lowpass12k, afftdn, agate, acompressor, loudnorm 2-pass, alimiter, apad

insert.shape: floating 16:9 rounded card near the top of the frame

broll.aiGenNote: Template 03 B-roll plays inside a 16:9 insert card — generate clips at aspect_ratio 16:9, resolution 720p, generate_audio false.

sfx.pacing: ~1 SFX per 12s of final video; fewer for clips under 60s
sfx.note: Every clip gets SFX but kept sparse — at most 5, each context-matched to the beat it lands on (whoosh on transitions, ding on CTA/follow-card, punch on punchlines, riser before reveals). mix-sfx.py enforces the rule and writes output/finals/final.mp4.

pipeline.differenceFromTemplate01: Only ONE source video (bottom = the talking head). There is no top.mp4 / screen recording. V88_PLAYBOOK Step 7 trims bottom only — skip the parallel top trim. Everything else is identical.
pipeline.differenceFromTemplate02: Same single full-screen face video, but B-roll does NOT cover the frame — it plays inside a floating 16:9 insert card over the upper third. B-roll is generated at 16:9 (not 9:16), and add-broll.py emits .top-insert cards instead of .fullscreen-media clips.
